title: Sony and Bungie reach an agreement with former Marathon director after $200 million lawsuit
summary: The studio and the platform resolved the lawsuit for defamation and wrongful termination, adding the plaintiff's name to the Marathon credits.

title: Mass layoffs at Xbox affect Bethesda and id Software, delay The Elder Scrolls 6 and cancel projects
summary: The cuts at Microsoft studios have drastically reduced the id Software team and caused delays in the development of The Elder Scrolls 6 and the cancellation of a new Perfect Dark.

title: Palworld launches version 1.0 keeping the price and warning about outdated mods
summary: Pocketpair keeps the price at $29.99 as a thank you and recommends removing old mods before the update.

title: Obsidian would develop a new Fallout for Xbox, according to multiple reports
summary: The studio that created Fallout: New Vegas is reportedly working on a new installment of the saga at the cost of canceling other projects like Avowed.

title: Persona 4 Revival will modify Yosuke's scenes to adapt to current times
summary: Atlus confirmed that the controversial character will receive changes in his dialogues and behavior to be more suitable for modern times.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced receives positive reviews but sparks controversy over its item shop
summary: The remake of the pirate game receives the best reviews of the series since 2013, although the inclusion of microtransactions has been criticized by players.

title: Dragon Age creators consider the series dead under Electronic Arts' control
summary: Both the original creator and the former lead writer believe the franchise has no future with EA, although they do not rule out returning if given the opportunity.

title: Sony faces criticism for eliminating physical discs on PlayStation starting in 2028
summary: Experts and players react negatively to the end of discs, while the company remains silent and hopes the media storm will pass.

title: GTA Online prepares the most ambitious heist in years, the first since 2020
summary: Rockstar will release a new heist in GTA Online with a confirmed date, generating great expectations among players.

title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 are now available on PS5 and PS4
summary: The classics of the saga arrive on modern consoles, although downloadable content is sold separately.

title: Dune 3 trailer reveals a disturbing character that Villeneuve hid for years
summary: The third part of Denis Villeneuve's adaptation shows a preview that impacts fans with an unsettling figure.

title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 shows its first major gameplay trailer
summary: The next title in the series presents new mechanics and battles in a detailed gameplay video.

title: Guides and scenic routes highlighted in Forza Horizon 6 set in Japan
summary: Several outlets share tips for finding secret locations and enjoying the best landscapes in the game.

title: Subnautica 2 reaches 5 million copies sold and prepares its first major update
summary: The underwater survival game continues to grow with new features, although the studio maintains certain red lines in design.

title: The Fallout series receives 9 Emmy nominations, fewer than the previous season
summary: The television adaptation of the video game continues to garner recognition, although the number of nominations is lower compared to its first season.

title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book will have a demo available on Nintendo eShop
summary: Nintendo will release a demo of the new Yoshi game for Switch 2 and Switch, allowing players to try the adventure before its launch.

title: Brigandine: Abyss will launch a demo on Switch 2 at the end of July
summary: The strategy RPG will offer a trial version on July 30 for players to explore its tactical world.

title: Disgaea Mayhem demo now available and shows the return of the series' producer
summary: The new strategy RPG from the producer of Disgaea arrives with a playable demo that anticipates its classic mechanics.

title: Deltarune adds hidden dialogue that connects three mysteries and updates its chapter 5 on Switch
summary: Toby Fox's game receives an update that reveals new connections in the plot and is now available on Nintendo Switch.

title: Sword Art Online finally adapts the Aincrad arc in its new RPG Echoes of Aincrad
summary: The team behind the SAO games confirms the release of Echoes of Aincrad, which recreates the original story of the anime.
